summary: Created normalized source markdown and segment map for the captured raw excerpt, preserving source order and noting likely raw truncation.

Added stable paragraph IDs [001]-[005] to headings and prose units.
Normalized one internal spacing issue: 'One day  he' -> 'One day he'.

issues.detail: Raw file is only 16 lines and ends mid-section after the second reflection paragraph. Neighboring chapters are materially longer, so source capture truncation is likely.
The preserved raw excerpt contains only one prose lead-in and two quoted paragraphs. Segment boundaries follow visible paragraph breaks only.
Observed duplicated internal space in raw: 'One day  he'. Normalized in working copy only.

remaining_issues: Verify against the source URL whether additional text is missing from the raw capture.
If raw is recollected later, regenerate normalized and segment outputs from the fuller source.
